title: agent lab/mar28
author: BenedictChannn
body:
- **chore(general): add gitignore and cursor command/rule**
- **Add agent_lab harness for autonomous training experiments**
- **agent_lab E2: default NUM_KV_HEADS=2 (better final_int8_ttt_lora vs 4)**
- **agent_lab E3: default TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=262144 (more steps/wall, better ttt val_bpb)**
- **agent_lab E4: default MATRIX_LR=0.06 (improved final_int8_ttt_lora)**
- **docs: agent_lab session log 2026-03-28 and README runtime note**
- **feat(agent-lab): experiments registry, commit conventions, and cursor skill**
- **feat(agent-lab): run_exp.sh, skill merge, interaction + journal guidance**
- **docs(agent-lab): researcher mindset section in skill**
